mapper.sql: mg.id AS id, mg.id AS merchant_goods_id, sku.id AS sku_id, spu.spu_name AS name, brand.brand_name AS brand, spu.brand_id AS brand_id, category.category_name AS category, category.id AS category_id, COALESCE(parent_cat.category_name, '') AS parent_category, COALESCE(root_cat.category_name, '') AS root_category, COALESCE(spu.description, mg.detail_content, '') AS summary, mg.sale_price AS price, mg.freight_amount AS freight_amount, mg.sale_price AS member_price, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NOT NULL THEN LEAST(COALESCE(mg.stock_qty, sku.stock_qty), sku.stock_qty) ELSE COALESCE(mg.stock_qty, sku.stock_qty, 0) END AS stock, sku.spec_text AS specs, '确认后 48 小时内发货' AS lead_time, CASE WHEN mg.delivery_mode = 'PROJECT' THEN '项目交付' ELSE '现货' END AS badge, COALESCE(mg.main_image_id, spu.main_image_id) AS main_image_id, COALESCE(mg.image_ids, spu.image_ids) AS image_ids, COALESCE(mg.keywords, spu.keywords) AS keywords, mg.detail_content AS detail_content, m.shop_name AS shop_name, COALESCE(mg.sale_count, 0) AS sale_count, mg.merchant_id AS merchant_id

FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category parent_cat ON parent_cat.id = category.parent_id AND parent_cat.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category root_cat ON root_cat.id = parent_cat.parent_id AND root_cat.deleted = 0 JOIN merchant_info m ON m.id = mg.merchant_id AND m.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0
WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.sale_status = 'ON' AND ( mg.supplier_id IS NULL OR ( relation_row.status = 'ACTIVE' AND auth_row.auth_status = 'ACTIVE' ) )
